title: Central University of Haryana Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: Central University of Haryana Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Central University of Haryana Result 2026 out for Master of Arts (Hindi) 1st 2nd Semester and Master of Commerce 1st 2nd Semester term end examinations on the official website - cuh.ac.in on 14-04-2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the Central University of Haryana result.

content.text: Central University of Haryana (CUH), Mahendergarh has officially released the Central University of Haryana Result 2026 for regular term end examinations of Master of Arts (Hindi) 1st and 2nd Semester and Master of Commerce 1st and 2nd Semester. These PG semester results for the latest academic session have been published online, allowing MA Hindi and M.Com students to check their course-wise performance for the recent TEE.

Central University of Haryana Result 2026 has been published online on the official website - cuh.ac.in through the CUH result portal at cuh.ac.in/Result.aspx and the Samarth portal cuhcdoe.samarth.edu.in. Students can log in using their enrollment or registration number and date of birth, select the relevant programme (MA Hindi or M.Com) and semester, and download their individual marksheet. After checking their marks, candidates should carefully verify their name, enrollment number, course, semester and subject-wise grades, and contact the examination branch in case of any discrepancy in the result.

sections.heading: Central University of Haryana Results 2026 Key Highlights

content.text: Central University of Haryana has updated its official result page with the latest regular term end examination results for MA Hindi and M.Com 1st and 2nd Semesters as part of CUH Result 2025-2026. Through the CUH result portal and Samarth platform, students can quickly access their semester-wise marks and download provisional scorecards for academic progression and further processes.

rows: Master of Arts (Hindi), Master of Commerce (M.Com)
MA Hindi 1st Semester, MA Hindi 2nd Semester, M.Com 1st Semester, M.Com 2nd Semester
Regular Term End Examinations (TEE Dec 2025/Academic Session 2025-26)
Enrollment/Registration Number and Date of Birth
Declared for MA Hindi and M.Com 1st 2nd Semester

sections.heading: Central University of Haryana Result 2026 Direct Link

content.text: CUH has activated the direct result links for MA Hindi and M.Com regular TEE results on its official Results page and Samarth portal. Using the links below, students can go to the CUH result interface, choose their programme and semester, and instantly view or download their Central University of Haryana Result 2026 upon entering valid login credentials.

links.label: MA Hindi 1st Semester Regular Term End Examination Result 2026
MA Hindi 2nd Semester Regular Term End Examination Result 2026
M.Com 1st Semester Regular Term End Examination Result 2026
M.Com 2nd Semester Regular Term End Examination Result 2026
CUH Samarth Result Portal (MA Hindi, M.Com Regular Result)

sections.heading: How to Download Central University of Haryana Result 2026

content.text: Students can follow the steps below to check Central University of Haryana Result 2026 for MA Hindi and M.Com 1st and 2nd Semester online.

items: Visit the official CUH website cuh.ac.in and click on the "Results" link, or directly open https://www.cuh.ac.in/Result.aspx.
On the Results page, locate the notification for "Regular Result Term End Examinations - Master of Arts (Hindi) 1st/2nd Semester, Master of Commerce 1st/2nd Semester".
Click on the relevant result link or on the Samarth portal link (cuhcdoe.samarth.edu.in) if provided.
On the result login page, select your Programme (MA Hindi or M.Com) and Semester (1st or 2nd) if asked.
Enter your Enrollment/Registration Number and Date of Birth correctly in the given fields.
Click on the "Submit" or "View Result" button to display your Central University of Haryana Result 2026 on the screen.
Check your name, enrollment number, course, semester and subject-wise grades/marks carefully, and then download or print the provisional marksheet for future reference.
